sitoPeakTapeSummary.mission: ARC SE SITO MAX PROFIT EXTRACTION + PROFIT PRESERVATION ENGINE V3
sitoPeakTapeSummary.reportLimitations: The master-report tars contain aggregate SITO structure, direction, authority, and cycle memory, not every tick after each exit. Exact peak-vs-realized missed-profit math is therefore calculated from persisted paper trade rows with peakUnrealizedPnl fields, while per-bot adaptive trust is derived from the two requested reports.
